query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as wd,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_in_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as cin,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%m-%d %H:%i') as cout,
  worked_minutes as wm,
  financial_minutes as fm,
  late_minutes as lm,
  early_leave_minutes as elm
FROM worker_daily_finance 
WHERE worker_id = 180104
ORDER BY work_date;
